title: An Act to Protect Recipients of Public Assistance from Housing Discrimination
summary: An Act to Protect Recipients of Public Assistance from Housing Discrimination

actions.action: Received by the Clerk of the House on March 12, 2025.
The Bill was REFERRED to the Committee on HOUSING AND ECONOMIC DEVELOPMENT pursuant to Joint Rule 308.2 and ordered printed pursuant to Joint Rule 401.
Carried over, in the same posture, to the next special or regular session of the 132nd Legislature, pursuant to Joint Order SP 519.
Work Session Held
Voted: Divided Report
Reported Out: OTP/ONTP
Reports READ.
On motion of Representative GERE of Kennebunkport, the Majority Ought to Pass Report was ACCEPTED.
ROLL CALL NO. 322 (Yeas 72 - Nays 70 - Absent 9 - Excused 0)
The Bill was READ ONCE.
Under suspension of the rules, the Bill was given its SECOND READING without REFERENCE to the Committee on Bills in the Second Reading.
The Bill was PASSED TO BE ENGROSSED.
Sent for concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.
Reports Read
On motion by Senator CURRY of Waldo the Minority Ought Not to Pass Report ACCEPTED In NON-CONCURRENCE.
Sent down for concurrence
The House INSISTED on ACCEPTANCE of the Majority Ought to Pass Report and PASSAGE TO BE ENGROSSED
ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.
On motion by Senator PIERCE of Cumberland The Senate INSISTED on ACCEPTANCE of The Minority Ought Not To Pass Report.
Placed in Legislative Files (DEAD)

votes.description: Acc Maj Ought To Pass Rep RC #322
